splash.body: Every pet has a Petsona. Let's capture yours — breed, vitals, vet records, and a care plan tuned to them.
splash.termsLead: By continuing, you agree to our

cameraPermission.title: Petsona needs your camera.
cameraPermission.intro: Two ways your camera makes Petsona work:

benefit1.title: Quick check-up of anything off
benefit1.body: Snap a photo when something looks wrong. We tell you if it's calm, watch, or urgent.

benefit2.title: A timeline that builds itself
benefit2.body: Photos, receipts, vet documents — all auto-filed to your pet's story.

cameraDenied.title: Petsona can't continue without camera.
cameraDenied.body: Enable camera in Settings — Petsona needs it to identify your pet and digitize records.
cameraDenied.step2: Find Petsona in the app list

capture.tipFront: Front-facing photo · face and chest visible
capture.tipSide: Profile shot · full body if possible

errors.compressionFailed: We couldn't process that photo. Please try again.
errors.uploadFailed: Photo upload failed. Please check your connection and try again.
errors.identifyFailed: We couldn't identify the breed. Please try again.
errors.libraryDenied: Photo library access is needed to pick a photo.

collection.bodyState1: Different angles help us read breed traits accurately.
collection.bodyState2: Vet passport, DNA test, or any record — speeds up your profile.
collection.bodyState3: Ready to read what these photos tell us about your pet.
collection.sideSubActive: Profile shot · full body if possible
collection.docSubActive: Any document with breed, vitals, or vaccinations

welcome.subtitle: Here's what we read from your photos.
welcome.error: We couldn't save your pet's profile. Please try again.
